chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 190 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA 2912/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 04.11.2025. None have been present in this case on the last several dates of hearing inspite of notices being issued to the counsel and the applicant. In the circumstances, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
